title: hebe traversii
intro: Hebe traversii, also known as the mountain hebe, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It belongs to the hebe family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, thanks to its adaptogenic properties and ability to reduce inflammation. Hebe traversii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal remedies for its health benefits, such as stress relief and immune system support.
